title: mallotus paniculatus var. formosanus
intro: Mallotus paniculatus var. formosanus, also known as Formosan mallotus or Taiwanese mallotus, is a plant species in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Mallotus paniculatus var. formosanus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and potentially improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
